leadText: Flittle (Japanese: ヒラヒナ Hirahina) is a Psychic-type Pokémon introduced in Generation IX. It evolves into Espathra starting at level 35.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Flittle is a small Pokémon resembling a bird chick, with a yellow body, large blue eyes with a lavender triangular mark between them, and a small lavender mouth. It has white frills on its head and both yellow and pink frills extending from its belly, which it uses to emit psychic energy. Its pointed feet are extremely small and appear to serve no use in movement, dangling from its body as it levitates above the ground. Flittle spends most of its time roaming wastelands and mountainous regions. Flittle is also known to be quite vengeful. Should anyone steal Flittle's berries, it will chase after them for revenge. Evolution [ edit | edit source ] Flittle evolves into Espathra . (For specifics on this Pokémon's Evolution in the games, refer to Game data→Evolution data .) Unevolved Flittle Psychic → First Evolution Espathra Psychic

If anyone steals its beloved berries, it will chase them down and exact its revenge. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Flittle was designed by Atsuko Nishida . [ 1 ] Origin [ edit | edit source ] Flittle's appearance may be based on the chicks of various bird species. The frills on its body resemble a frilled dress or gown . Its overall body shape may also be inspired by an ostrich egg or the dumbo octopus . Name origin [ edit | edit source ] Flittle may be a combination of flitter (a fluttering movement) and little . Hirahina may be a combination of ひらひら hirahira (onomatopoetic word for fluttering) and 雛 hina (chick). ↑ Instagram post by Atsuko Nishida (@coloatsu) on the Paldean Pokémon designed by her. Posted on December 1, 2024.
